recommendations.title: The Son of Kong
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Action, Horror, Family, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Beleaguered adventurer Carl Denham returns to the island where he found King Kong.

recommendations.title: King Kong
recommendations.overview: Adventurous filmmaker Carl Denham sets out to produce a motion picture unlike anything the world has seen before. Alongside his leading lady Ann Darrow and his first mate Jack Driscoll, they arrive on an island and discover a legendary creature said
recommendations.director: Ernest B. Schoedsack, Merian C. Cooper

recommendations.title: Mighty Joe Young
recommendations.overview: A young woman, Jill Young, grew up on her father's ranch in Africa, raising a large gorilla named Joe from an infant. Years later, she brings him to Hollywood to become a star.

recommendations.title: The Silencing
recommendations.overview: A reformed hunter becomes involved in a deadly game of cat and mouse when he and the local sheriff set out to track a vicious killer who may have kidnapped his daughter years ago.

recommendations.title: Sympathy for the Devil
recommendations.overview: After being forced to drive a mysterious passenger at gunpoint, a man finds himself in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where it becomes clear that not everything is as it seems.

recommendations.title: Killer Elite
recommendations.overview: Based on a shocking true story, Killer Elite pits two of the world’s most elite operatives—Danny, an ex-special ops agent and Hunter, his longtime mentor—against the cunning leader of a secret military society. Covering the globe from Australia to Pa

recommendations.title: Hush
recommendations.overview: A young couple on a motorway journey are drawn into a game of cat and mouse with a truck driver when they see something disturbing in the back of his vehicle.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Manhunter
recommendations.overview: FBI Agent Will Graham, who retired after catching Hannibal Lecktor, returns to duty to engage in a risky cat-and-mouse game with Lecktor to capture a new killer.

recommendations.title: Amber Alert
recommendations.overview: A ride-share turns into a high-stakes game of cat and mouse after it follows a car fitting the description of an AMBER Alert.
